function.name: schedule_tool
function.description: Save one or more tool calls to SQLite for future execution by the background scheduler.

tool_calls.description: Ordered tool calls to run later as one scheduled item.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool that should run later.

tool_parameters.description: Parameters to pass to the tool when it runs.

run_at.description: Specific date and time to run, preferably ISO 8601 such as 2026-06-29T00:00:00+05:30.

repeat.description: Optional recurrence text, such as daily, weekly, every day at 00:00, or cron-style text.

timezone_name.description: Timezone for interpreting the schedule, such as Asia/Calcutta.

enabled.description: Whether this scheduled item is active.

notes.description: Optional human-readable note about this schedule.

function.name: list_scheduled_tools
function.description: List saved calendar tool schedules from the SQLite scheduler database.

include_disabled.description: Whether to include disabled scheduled items.

function.name: get_scheduled_tool
function.description: Get one saved calendar tool schedule by its schedule id.

function.name: update_scheduled_tool
function.description: Update a saved calendar tool schedule. Only provided fields are changed.

schedule_id.description: ID of the scheduled item to update.

tool_calls.description: Replacement ordered tool calls for this scheduled item.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool that should run later.

tool_parameters.description: Parameters to pass to the tool when it runs.

run_at.description: Updated specific run date and time.

enabled.description: Whether this scheduled item is active.

function.name: delete_scheduled_tool
function.description: Delete a saved calendar tool schedule by its schedule id.

schedule_id.description: ID of the scheduled item to delete.
